response.justification: Candidate is a strong web/full-stack developer with TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang experience, but the role requires deep embedded C development, Linux kernel modification, networking security stack (MACsec, 802.1X), and switch-chip/firmware expertise — none of which appear in the resume. Critically, the role mandates native-level Japanese proficiency, which the candidate does not list. The mismatch on hard requirements makes this a clear no.
strengths: Long, broad software development track record across multiple stacks
Some low-level C/C++ exposure from National Instruments LabWindows/CVI work
Strong testing discipline (TDD, CI/CD, workshops on testing)
concerns: No native-level Japanese — hard requirement not met
No embedded firmware, Linux kernel modification, or LAN-switch/networking-security experience
No demonstrated expertise in MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP, or chip-vendor SDKs
